Algorithm 3 Optimize Alpha for Heads
Require: heads,alphas ▷Inputsforoptimization
1 procedureOptimize-Alphas(heads,alphas)
2 Initializebest_alphas←None,best_precision←0,best_recall←0
3 whilei<max_iterationsandno_improve_counter<required_no_improvedo
4 i←iteration+1
5 Computeprecision,recall←Evaluate-Configuration(heads,alphas)
6 if precision > best_precision or (precision = best_precision and recall > best_recall)
then
7 best_alphas←alphas,{best_precision,best_recall}←{precision,recall}
8 Resetno_improve_counter←0
9 else
10 Incrementno_improve_counter
11 endif
12 if precision=1then
13 Adjustalpha_stepanddecreasealphas
14 elseif precision<1then
15 Adjustalpha_stepandincreasealphas
16 endif
17 endwhile
18 returnbest_alphas,best_precision,best_recall
19 endprocedure
